name: flybase.org
message: [AI generated] FlyBase is a comprehensive database for information on the genetics and molecular biology of Drosophila, primarily Drosophila melanogaster. It serves as a vital resource for researchers, providing extensive data on fruit fly genetics, gene functions, and associated biological pathways. FlyBase supports the scientific community by offering curated genetic information, tools for data analysis, and facilitating advances in genetic research.
